text: ADR-0001 — Record vfkb architecture decisions as immutable ADRs → docs/adr/ADR-0001-record-decisions-as-adrs.md

ADR-0009 — Decision identity = nanoid; human ADR ordinal assigned at merge-to-`main` → docs/adr/ADR-0009-decision-identity-and-numbering.md
ADR-0010 — Product Vision — context-doc narrative + heuristic `pattern`s (no new type) → docs/adr/ADR-0010-product-vision.md
ADR-0011 — Envelope v1 adopts a validity window + structured provenance origin; trust is derived → docs/adr/ADR-0011-envelope-richness.md
ADR-0012 — Two-stage retrieval pipeline; v1 ships the Heuristic reranker (default); Stage-1 candidate-narrowing right-sized for the per-project tier → docs/adr/ADR-0012-two-stage-retrieval.md
ADR-0013 — No hard native dependency; pluggable `Index` with a pure-JS in-memory default, SQLite/FTS5 an optional backend → docs/adr/ADR-0013-no-hard-native-dep.md
ADR-0014 — Index freshness = content-derived token + explicit rebuild, never mtime; regen is a guaranteed side-effect of every write → docs/adr/ADR-0014-index-freshness.md

ADR-0015 — Cross-harness auto-layer adopts a tiered parity model; per-turn injection is Pi-only on Claude Code (MCP-pull floor); a narrowed Phase 0 spike settles attention/cache/budget → docs/adr/ADR-0015-cross-harness-auto-layer.md
ADR-0016 — Explicit search is relevance-primary; the EmbeddingReranker is un-deferred to Planned-pending-verification (amends ADR-0012) → docs/adr/ADR-0016-search-ranking-and-embedding-revisit.md
ADR-0017 — Explicit search applies a relative relevance floor (amends ADR-0016) → docs/adr/ADR-0017-search-relevance-floor.md
ADR-0018 — Search reports a cause-distinguished, honest no-match (amends ADR-0016) → docs/adr/ADR-0018-honest-no-match-contract.md
RFC-001 — Explicit search applies a relative relevance floor → docs/rfc/RFC-001-search-relevance-floor.md
RFC-002 — Search reports an explicit, cause-distinguished no-match → docs/rfc/RFC-002-honest-no-match-contract.md
RFC-003 — The EmbeddingReranker ships as an opt-in "accuracy mode" search tier → docs/rfc/RFC-003-embedding-accuracy-mode.md
RFC-004 — vfkb self-hosts its own design-brain (commit `.vfkb/`; ADRs link-not-copy) → docs/rfc/RFC-004-self-hosted-design-brain.md

The per-project brain is SINGLE-HOMED and git-committed at `<main-repo>/.vfkb` (DESIGN D2c). Commit `.vfkb/entries.jsonl` (append-only, merge=union — the SoR); the derived index (`index-meta.json`, `.sessions/`) is gitignored and rebuilt on read, never committed (ADR-0014).

Source-of-truth split: markdown ADRs in `docs/adr/` are the authoritative DECISION record (ADR-0001); the brain holds a `link` entry per ADR/RFC pointing at the repo-relative path and NEVER copies decision content (D1 constraint 4 / RFC-004). So there is no dual-SoR drift.
Build output `dist/` is gitignored; `npm test` runs `tsc` via pretest, so tests rebuild first. Never `docker build` expecting a committed `dist/` — rebuild before any image build.

Decision identity = nanoid (canonical, merge-safe); the human `ADR-NNNN` ordinal is stamped by the engine sole-writer at merge-to-main (ADR-0009). An RFC is a `decision` in `proposed` status (ADR-0007), promoted to an ADR on acceptance — no separate RFC entry type.

v1 retrieval bug: `query()` reused the INJECTION reranker for explicit SEARCH, discarding relevance — a held answer sorted to ~rank 90 was cut by `limit`, so the agent gave a confident WRONG answer. Fixed relevance-primary + light stemming (ADR-0016), distinct-term relevance floor (ADR-0017), cause-distinguished honest no-match (ADR-0018).

Failed approach: trusting the Phase-3 retrieval-quality gate — its fixtures were too small to expose scale ranking; a scale regression test now closes it.

dogfood-smoke check 6 (LLM driving MCP in one-shot `claude -p`) races the MCP cold-start and intermittently fails with "tools still connecting". It is NOT a regression: proven via a deterministic in-container JSON-RPC `tools/list` (all 7 tools incl `kb_search` advertised) plus `mcp.test.ts` green. Candidate follow-up: a wait-for-ready before the one-shot turn.

Search `score` is an UNNORMALIZED stemmed term-overlap count that includes repeats — a long entry hammering one common query token outscores a tight match on one DISTINCT term. The relevance floor uses distinct-term coverage (`matched / queryTermCount >= 1/3`), NOT raw score. Do not port AnythingLLM's 0.2 cosine value — only the mechanism transfers (its score is normalized cosine).

Evidence-gated build discipline: do not build speculatively. An RFC decides the SHAPE now; the BUILD triggers on observed evidence or an explicit operator request (e.g. RFC-003 embeddings — a 2nd live phrasing miss; ADR-0016 G1). "Runbook complete before execute."

Deterministic backstop > probabilistic gate: a structural/guardrail rule (e.g. Bash mutation tool-gating) is unit-tested deterministically (`gating.ts:isBrainWrite` + `guardrails.test.ts`), not left to the probabilistic L4 harness. A full paid L4 rerun is deferred as low-value when every behavior is unit-tested at HEAD.
Tier-B auto-capture SKIPS vfkb's own `kb_*` / `mcp__vfkb__*` tool calls (commit 31f4266) to avoid corpus self-pollution — the substrate must not record its own reads/writes as knowledge.

ADR-0021 — Auto-distill + ACE curator (incoming-only distill; deltas+counters; never-rewrite Brake) → docs/adr/ADR-0021-auto-distill-and-curator.md
vfkb is developed in ~/VFKB/vfkb and tracks its OWN development by dogfooding this .vfkb brain (VFKB_DIR=.vfkb + the vfkb CLI) — NOT mykb / the kb workflow. See CLAUDE.md.

Status 2026-06-28: v1 (per-project tier) + H4 Track 1/4/4b all COMPLETE; in-repo H4 frontier EXHAUSTED (no in-order build remains). Rebranded vtfkb->vfkb (ADR-0026). 95/95 unit. Next work = a new fork -> re-ratify docs/H4-DEVELOPMENT-ROADMAP.md first.

Gated, do NOT build on spec: S1 embedding reranker (RFC-003, build on a 2nd live phrasing-robustness miss or explicit ask); P1 Claude-Code per-turn push (ADR-0015 Tier C, external-blocked upstream). Parked: H2 fleet wiring, H3 global tier.
Open finding: Claude Code's PostToolUse hook does NOT fire on a FAILED tool call -> live failure-capture is pi-only (external-block). live-capture-result scenario is harness-gated to pi.

Open finding: tool-gating (brain-write block) is FLAKY on the pi 0.73.1 substrate — holds only intermittently (guardrail integrity). A/B-confirmed NOT a code regression; needs its own investigation (re-ratify before fixing).
npm install here uses the corporate Nexus (nexus.optiscangroup.com) -> ENOTFOUND off-VPN. node_modules was bootstrapped by copying from ~/GitHub/vfkb. On VPN a normal install works.

Session handoff 2026-06-28: built a CODE knowledge-graph via the understand-anything skill -> .understand-anything/knowledge-graph.json (196 nodes / 410 edges, 8 layers, 11-step tour); view with /understand-dashboard, refresh with /understand (incremental via fingerprints.json). KEY FINDING: src/engine.ts is a ~700-line highest-fan-in hub (every face + curator/distiller/read import it) -> candidate refactor: split storage-writes / decision-family lifecycle / render+rerank / capture. Graph also CONFIRMS the clean 'one engine, two faces' layering (only inbound edges are test->src).

Open process gap (2026-06-28): nothing mechanically reminds the agent to kb_add — PostToolUse auto-capture is OFF here by design (deliberate knowledge only), and there is NO Stop hook. Proposed fix (NOT built): a Stop hook in .claude/settings.json that nudges record + resume-note before ending. Also unresolved: .understand-anything/ (graph artifacts) is NOT gitignored yet — decide commit-vs-ignore.
Pursue reliable decision-capture via a CONDITIONAL end-of-turn Stop-hook reminder (RFC-008), not a plain prose rule and not an every-turn nag.
RFC-008 — conditional end-of-turn Stop-hook decision-capture reminder (Proposed/WIP) docs/rfc/RFC-008-decision-capture-reminder.md
